query:
UPDATE products SET image2Url = CASE 
  WHEN id = 8 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542272604-787c62d465d1?w=600'
  WHEN id = 9 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521572163474-6864f9cf17ab?w=600'
  WHEN id = 10 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1596399579883-d7d07c1a5d3e?w=600'
  WHEN id = 11 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1543163521-9efcc06b9558?w=600'
  WHEN id = 12 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1539533057440-7814bae1ef51?w=600'
  WHEN id = 13 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1594938298603-c8148c4dae35?w=600'
  WHEN id = 14 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521572163474-6864f9cf17ab?w=600'
  WHEN id = 15 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551028719-00167b16ebc5?w=600'
  WHEN id = 16 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521572163474-6864f9cf17ab?w=600'
  WHEN id = 17 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551028719-00167b16ebc5?w=600'
  WHEN id = 18 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542272604-787c62d465d1?w=600'
  WHEN id = 19 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1594938298603-c8148c4dae35?w=600'
  WHEN id = 20 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1596399579883-d7d07c1a5d3e?w=600'
  WHEN id = 21 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1594938298603-c8148c4dae35?w=600'
  WHEN id = 22 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1543163521-9efcc06b9558?w=600'
  WHEN id = 23 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1539533057440-7814bae1ef51?w=600'
  WHEN id = 24 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1596399579883-d7d07c1a5d3e?w=600'
  WHEN id = 25 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542291026-7eec264c27ff?w=600'
  WHEN id = 26 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1539533057440-7814bae1ef51?w=600'
  WHEN id = 27 THEN 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1596399579883-d7d07c1a5d3e?w=600'
END WHERE id BETWEEN 8 AND 27;
